use_cases: Display real-time flight status including departure/arrival times and gate information
Show boarding progress with visual indicators for airline passengers
Present airline branding and flight details in a single consolidated card view
Track and display boarding time countdown for airport displays or mobile apps
Visualize flight journey progress from origin to destination
ai_summary: A flight status card component displaying comprehensive airline information including departure and arrival cities, flight numbers, gate details, boarding times, and real-time status indicators. Built with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion, it features animated entrance effects and a visual progress bar showing journey completion. Designed for travel booking platforms, airline apps, and corporate travel management dashboards where users need to track flight information at a glance.
